params_echo.note: Batch F-1 amazon Q/Rufus (response_type not specified)

findings.blocker: Amazon Rufus AI chat UI is NOT accessible from this session. (1) Navigated to https://www.amazon.com — homepage loaded showing US storefront (Get youthful skin with tretinoin promo, designer brands, deals) but no Rufus chat icon or button visible on the homepage, even after scroll. Account status: not logged in (header shows 'Hello, Account &...'), region indicator shows 'EN' / US. (2) Attempted direct URL https://www.amazon.com/ask?initialPrompt=hello — returned 404 'Sorry, we couldn't find that page' (Amazon's Lucy-the-dog 404 page).
reasons_rufus_not_available: (a) Rufus is region-gated — primarily available to logged-in US-residence users with US delivery address; this test PC's IP likely geolocates to KR which may not get Rufus UI even on amazon.com
(b) Rufus generally requires a logged-in customer session; anonymous browsing does not expose the AI chat entry point
(c) Rufus typically launches from product detail pages via a 'Rufus' button in the right rail, not from the homepage or a dedicated /ask URL (that URL does not exist)
(d) Amazon Q (for Business) is a separate auth-gated enterprise product accessed from aws.amazon.com / Q Developer console, not from amazon.com storefront

status_detail: BLOCKED: cannot test APF check-warning for amazon because the Rufus AI chat UI is not reachable from this test PC's session. services registry entry for 'amazon' with response_type unspecified suggests that no one has successfully captured an amazon AI endpoint yet — which aligns with the region+auth gating. Recommendations: (a) if amazon is important for coverage, establish a logged-in US-AWS-console session on test PC and retest via Amazon Q Developer (q.aws.amazon.com), (b) or de-scope amazon from services=128 until credentials/region alignment is resolved, (c) or retarget the test at a specific public product page known to expose Rufus (but that would still need login). Today's run provides negative evidence: Rufus not accessible from anonymous amazon.com homepage.
errors: Amazon Rufus AI chat UI not reachable; homepage has no Rufus entry; /ask URL returns 404; service-not-testable from this session
